architecture: orchestrator-side silero v5 VAD (onnxruntime CPU) -> utterance on VAD-close -> G4-validated /upstream/speaches batch path with stt_stream_model (large-v3-turbo-ct2) -> per-utterance finals; rolling stt_delta partials every ~1.5s (drop-frame); D10 warm+PRIME (residency-proving silent-wav prime, not HTTP liveness); D12 voice_session; parked realtime bridge behind ONBOX_STT_REALTIME=0 (protocol audit found it broken live: LOOPBACK_HOST_URL crash + 3s VAD floor)

ws_client_test.clip: known-text Qwen-TTS clip, 11.2s @24kHz, natural mid-clip pause
ws_client_test.events: loading_models -> listening -> speech -> 4 cumulative stt_delta partials -> processing -> final#1 -> listening -> speech -> processing -> final#2 -> stt_done
ws_client_test.segmentation: VAD closed exactly at the clip's natural pause -> 2 utterances (the user-specified chunking semantics)
ws_client_test.transcript_quality: matches the G4 batch baseline (same synthetic-voice homophone quirks only)
